info.name: LoadBalancerPro
info.description: Ready-to-import requests for the LoadBalancerPro Spring Boot API.

item.name: Evidence Training Demo Walkthrough
item.description: Ordered local operator demo: health, readiness, onboarding discovery, scorecard detail, answer template, and deterministic grading samples. Read-only discovery plus in-memory grading only.

item.name: GET Strict Zero Drift Pass Scorecard
GET Strict Zero Drift Pass Answer Template
Routing Decision Demo
item.description: Ordered local routing demo: health, readiness, and read-only request-level routing comparison samples. Uses synthetic candidate telemetry only and does not mutate cloud state.

item.name: Unified Load-Balancing Cockpit
item.description: Ordered local cockpit demo: health, readiness, routing comparison, allocation preview, predictive allocation, and read-only load-shedding/remediation evaluation. Uses synthetic inputs and does not mutate cloud state.

item.name: Operator Scenario Gallery
item.description: Ordered local scenario gallery demo: health, readiness, and per-scenario routing, allocation, and read-only evaluation calls for normal load, overload pressure, all-unhealthy degradation, and recovery. Uses deterministic synthetic inputs only and does not mutate cloud state.

body.raw:
